_comment: Illustrative output only. Actual LLM output will differ. Numbers derived from the 9 valid sample deals.

win_themes.theme: Integration flexibility and API quality is decisive in enterprise deals
Support SLA and onboarding quality converts mid-market buyers who had bad vendor experiences
UI simplicity wins non-technical SMB buyers over incumbent tools
Self-serve trial converts startup segment without sales involvement

loss_themes.theme: Price premium lost 2 deals to competitors offering deep year-1 discounts
Missing security certifications (SSO, SOC 2 Type II) blocked enterprise deals
Status quo won where there was no compelling event and the POC lacked authority

competitor_analysis.why_we_win: Reporting features and API flexibility outperform them in mid-market bake-offs
competitor_analysis.why_we_lose: No clear loss in dataset — need more data
Price matching and incumbent familiarity are barriers in SMB

competitor_analysis.why_we_win: No wins recorded in this dataset
competitor_analysis.why_we_lose: Deep discounting and SOC 2 certification are decisive

segment_breakdown.top_loss_reason: Missing security certifications and price premium

recommended_actions.action: Prioritize SOC 2 Type II certification for enterprise pipeline
recommended_actions.rationale: Lost D004 ($60k) specifically due to this gap; CompetitorC is certified

recommended_actions.action: Build a flexible year-1 discount program for competitive SMB deals
recommended_actions.rationale: Lost D002 and D008 where competitors offered 40%+ discounts

recommended_actions.action: Invest in ROI documentation showing onboarding speed vs CompetitorA
recommended_actions.rationale: Onboarding quality wins mid-market but is not yet systematically documented

recommended_actions.action: Require executive sponsor identification before advancing SMB deals
recommended_actions.rationale: D006 lost because POC had no authority — classic status quo trap

data_quality_notes: 1 of 10 records skipped due to missing company name and close reason (D010)
CompetitorC data based on only 2 deals — low confidence
Mid-market 100% win rate is based on 2 deals — not statistically significant
No close dates provided — cannot filter by time period
